title: [FIRRTL] Lower non-trivial memory latencies to RTL

features.name: memory with unpacked array dimension
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration using unpacked array syntax where the array is a simple unpacked dimension

features.name: pipeline registers as unpacked reg array
features.description: Code should include pipeline registers implemented as an unpacked array of registers used for delaying signals

features.name: pipeline register with enable condition
features.description: Code should include pipeline registers that load conditionally based on an enable signal in an always_ff block

features.name: unpacked reg array initialization with RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT
features.description: Code should include initialization of unpacked array registers using RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT preprocessor directive

features.name: memory read with delayed address from pipeline
features.description: Code should include a memory read operation using a delayed address from a pipeline register
